candidates.snippet: ntemporary text type, designed by Hendrik Weber, that is at once elegant and sturdy, charming and reliable. Released in 2008, Lirico is Hendrik’s first commercially available type, though it is by no means the work of a

WOFF, and WOFF2 formats. Legacy font formats are available on request. Lirico has won a Type Directors Club NY award in 2009. Supported Languages Afrikaans Albanian Asu Basque Bemba Bena Breton Catalan Chiga Colognian Co
